mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(applicant_count), 0) from applications where plan_id = #{planId} and status = 0

select a.*, u.name user_name, u.employee_no, u.email, p.plan_no, p.destination from applications a join users u on u.id = a.user_id join travel_plans p on p.id = a.plan_id where a.plan_id = #{planId} and a.status = 0 order by a.created_at
select a.*, p.plan_no, p.destination from applications a join travel_plans p on p.id = a.plan_id where a.user_id = #{userId} order by a.updated_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into applications(plan_id, user_id, applicant_count, option_text, status) values(#{planId}, #{userId}, #{applicantCount}, #{optionText}, #{status})
mapper.update: update applications set applicant_count = #{applicantCount}, option_text = #{optionText}, status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update applications set status = 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
